sink.preCopyScript: IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.LP_FHI_cmt_CommissionTypes')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE ODS.LP_FHI_cmt_CommissionTypes;
IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.LP_MAC_cmt_CommissionTypes')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE ODS.LP_MAC_cmt_CommissionTypes;
IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.LP_MXH_cmt_CommissionTypes')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE ODS.LP_MXH_cmt_CommissionTypes;
IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.LP_PBC_cmt_CommissionTypes')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE ODS.LP_PBC_cmt_CommissionTypes;
IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.LP_RTW_cmt_CommissionTypes')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE ODS.LP_RTW_cmt_CommissionTypes;

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
ID	,
Descr	,
OverUnder	,
Back	,
BaseCommission	,
Discount	,
Front	,
OverLimit	,
OverSplit	,
ShortLimit	,
ShortSplit	,
ExpAdmin	,
ExpInstall	,
ExpMarketing	,
ExpSales	,
Active	,
SortOrder	
	

FROM dbo.cmt_CommissionTypes WITH (NOLOCK)

sink.preCopyScript: IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.LP_SWR_cmt_CommissionTypes')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE ODS.LP_SWR_cmt_CommissionTypes;
IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.LP_PHI_cmt_CommissionTypes')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE ODS.LP_PHI_cmt_CommissionTypes;
IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.LP_HSI_cmt_CommissionTypes')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE ODS.LP_HSI_cmt_CommissionTypes;
